content.text:
Insight: I can’t run the automated analysis because the Northwind sales tables aren’t accessible under @Northwind/Analytics — please attach or grant access to the Orders, OrderDetails, Products, Customers (±Employees, Categories) datasets and I’ll run the full analysis.

1) What I tried / current status
- I can see the Analytics catalog node at @Northwind/Analytics, but I could not find or read the underlying data tables (no Orders, OrderDetails, Products, Customers, Employees, Categories nodes were available).
- Because the core tables are missing/unreachable, I cannot compute top products/customers, revenue concentration, or sales trends here.

2) Exact datasets I need (minimal pull)
- Orders: OrderID, OrderDate, CustomerID, EmployeeID, ShipCountry (or Region)
- OrderDetails (or Order_Details): OrderID, ProductID, UnitPrice, Quantity, Discount
- Products: ProductID, ProductName, CategoryID, UnitPrice
- Customers: CustomerID, CompanyName (or ContactName), Country
- (Optional) Categories: CategoryID, CategoryName; Employees: EmployeeID, EmployeeName
- Preferred formats: database read access (connection + credentials) OR CSV files named Orders.csv, OrderDetails.csv, Products.csv, Customers.csv placed under @Northwind/Analytics/data/

3) Minimal SQL / data extract I recommend (one-step pull)
- Single SQL join to extract rows for analysis (example):
  SELECT o.OrderID,o.OrderDate,o.CustomerID,c.CompanyName,
         od.ProductID,p.ProductName, od.UnitPrice, od.Quantity, od.Discount
  FROM Orders o
  JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID
  JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID
  JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE o.OrderDate BETWEEN '2019-01-01' AND CURRENT_DATE;
- Revenue per line = UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount)

4) What I will produce once data is available
- Top 5 products by revenue: product name, revenue, % of total revenue (bar chart)
- Top 5 customers by revenue: company name, revenue, % of total revenue (bar chart)
- Revenue concentration (Pareto/Lorenz): cumulative share chart and numeric shares for top 10% and top 20% of products and customers (cumulative line / pie)
- Sales trend (monthly or quarterly) over last 3 years: trend line, CAGR / % change, and seasonal notes
- Deliverables saved to @Northwind/Analytics/AutoAnalysis/YYYYMMDD/ as:
  - TopProducts.png, TopCustomers.png, Pareto.png, SalesTrend.png
  - TopProducts.csv, TopCustomers.csv, Concentration.csv, SalesTrend.csv
- Summary output: one-sentence “most important insight” + 2–3 short recommendations

5) If you can’t attach data now — quick actionable recommendations
- Grant read access to the @Northwind data store or upload the four CSVs above into @Northwind/Analytics/data/.
- If you prefer I run queries, provide DB connection details or a read-only view with Orders/OrderDetails/Products/Customers.
- If you want a quick local check: upload a sample CSV (20–50 rows) and I’ll demonstrate the analysis on the sample.

Next steps (pick one)
- Grant read access to @Northwind database for the Analytics agent, or
- Upload Orders.csv, OrderDetails.csv, Products.csv, Customers.csv to @Northwind/Analytics/data/, or
- Tell me to delegate to the Executor agent to run a prepared SQL (I can prepare the exact query and outputs).

If you want, I’ll prepare the SQL and analysis script (pandas/Python + chart outputs) right away and run it as soon as you provide access or upload the files.
